description: The 'Ndrina Vrenna is a mafia clan ('ndrina) based in Crotone, Italy, founded by Luigi Vrenna. It was involved in a violent feud in the 1970s and later engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and arms offenses. The clan declined after arrests in the 1970s and faced further crackdowns in the 2000s.

country_links.evidence_quote: rifornimento di esplosivo dalla criminalità albanese
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Vrenna sources explosives from Albanian criminal groups.
